name: Chocolate Angel Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate chips in the top of a double boiler or in a microwave-safe bowl.
2. Add sugar and egg yolks to the melted chocolate. Mix well.
3. Remove from heat and gradually add the stiffly beaten egg whites.
4. Cool mixture thoroughly.
5. Fold in whipped heavy cream.
6. Tear the angel food cake into bite-size pieces.
7. Sprinkle one layer of cake pieces (about half) over the bottom of a buttered 13x9-inch pan.
8. Cover with half of the chocolate mixture.
9. Repeat layers with more cake and chocolate mixture.
10. Chill overnight.
11. Cut into squares to serve.
